title: Sqlitelogictest wrong results in IN query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id Int32, value Int32, status UInt8);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(1, 10, 1), (2, NULL, 0), (3, -5, 1), (4, 20, NULL);
CREATE TABLE reference_table(ref_id Int32, ref_value Int32);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT ref_value FROM reference_table WHERE ref_value IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of IN query with NULL and negative values
